figures.caption: Fig. 2: Illustration of how we synthesize negative samples via adversarial instruction translation. We use GPT-5.2 as the Vision Language Model.

Table 2: Detailed performance on Agent/Human trajectory evaluation on ExeVRBench. We report Accuracy (Acc), Precision (Prec), and Recall (Rec). Underline indicates the second-best result, and bold indicates the best result. ExeVRM 8B achieves the best overall balance, outperforming open-source baselines and matching or exceeding strong proprietary models on most settings.

Table 3: Performance comparison across different evaluation strategies. Here Tail (T) means the last screenshot and Head (H) means the first screenshot. Compact denotes a compact list of action history, while Details denotes a structured action history. Oneshot means there is an example in the prompt as a reference.
